name: create_draft
description: Create a new draft on Typefully. Use this when user wants to create a new social media post, thread, or multi-platform content. Supports single tweets, threads (split with \n---\n), and cross-platform posts (X, LinkedIn, Threads, Bluesky, Mastodon). Use edit_draft to modify existing drafts, schedule_draft to schedule, delete_draft to remove.

text.description: The content of the draft. For threads, separate posts with \n---\n. Use '-' to read from stdin.

thread.description: Treat the text as a thread (split on \n---\n delimiter)

platform.description: Comma-separated platforms to post to (allowed: x, linkedin, threads, bluesky, mastodon)

schedule.description: Schedule time in ISO 8601 format (e.g., 2026-03-01T09:00:00Z) or 'next-free-slot' to use Typefully's queue schedule

name: delete_draft
description: Delete a draft from Typefully. Use this when user wants to remove an unwanted draft. Use get_draft to see draft details before deleting, or list_drafts to find drafts.

draft_id.description: The ID of the draft to delete (numeric)

name: edit_draft
description: Edit an existing draft on Typefully. Use this when user wants to modify the content of an existing draft. Supports thread editing and platform changes. Use get_draft to see current content before editing, or create_draft to create new drafts.

draft_id.description: The ID of the draft to edit (numeric)

text.description: New content for the draft. For threads, separate posts with \n---\n.

thread.description: Treat the text as a thread (split on \n---\n delimiter)

platform.description: Comma-separated platforms (allowed: x, linkedin, threads, bluesky, mastodon)

name: get_draft
description: Get full details of a single draft on Typefully. Use this when user wants to view the complete content, status, and metadata of a specific draft. Use list_drafts to find draft IDs, or edit_draft/schedule_draft/delete_draft to modify a draft after viewing its details.

draft_id.description: The ID of the draft to retrieve (numeric)

name: list_drafts
description: List drafts on Typefully. Use this when user wants to see their drafts with optional filtering by status. Use get_draft for full details of a specific draft, create_draft to make new drafts.

status.description: Filter by status: 'draft', 'scheduled', or 'published'. Default: all statuses.

limit.description: Maximum number of drafts to return

name: list_social_sets
description: List available social sets (accounts) on Typefully. Use this when user needs to find their social set ID or see all connected accounts. Required for setting up TYPEFULLY_SOCIAL_SET_ID when multiple accounts exist.

name: schedule_draft
description: Schedule or publish a draft on Typefully. Use this when user wants to schedule a draft for future publishing or publish immediately. Use 'now' to publish immediately (use with caution), 'next-free-slot' to use Typefully's queue schedule, or an ISO 8601 timestamp for specific time. Use get_draft to verify current schedule status.

draft_id.description: The ID of the draft to schedule (numeric)

schedule_time.description: Schedule time: ISO 8601 (e.g., 2026-03-01T09:00:00Z), 'next-free-slot' for Typefully's queue, or 'now' for immediate publishing
